titleStmt.title: SII 9.537: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 537. (A.R. No. 578 of 1912.) ON THE ROCKY FLOOR AT THE FOOT OF THE EAST WALL OF THE SECOND PRAKARA OF THE VIRABHADRA TEMPLE AT LEPAKSHI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the cyclic year Khara, Śrāvaṇa, ba. 12 in the reign of the Vijayanagara king Achyutarāya-Mahārāya, corresponding to A.D. 1531 August 9, Tuesday (not verifiable). It records the royal order to the Gauḍas of Cheluviṇḍla stating that the king made a gift of the village Cheluviṇḍla surnamed Komāra-Veṅkaṭādriyapura to the god Pāpavināśana and Gaṇapatihaḷḷi to Virapaṇṇa of Penugoṇḍa and that the ownership of both the villages was given to the latter.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kharasaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa ba 12 lū śrīmāmahārājādhirājan™ rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīraAcyutarāyamahārāyaru hāḍulakhayyana hōbaḷiya celuviṁḍla grāmada gauḍaprajegaḷige nirūpa niṁma grāmavanū lēpākṣi pāpavināśanadēvarige komāraveṁkaṭādriyapuraveṁdu penugoṁḍada śrī
virapaṁṇage gaṇapatihaḷiyanū celuviṁḍlagrāmake pratināmadhēyavāda veṁkaṭādriyapurava pāpavināśalēpākṣada vīrabhadradēvarigū dāna koṭeU vijenagarada paṭṭaṇada taḷavāṟa virūpaṁṇage śāsanastavāgi pālisideU virupaṁṇana Āṇe Āgnegoḷagāgi naḍaudāda kāraṇa Ā stitiyanu nirūpadi cittayisideU śrī
virapaṁṇa .
Digital edition of SII 9.537 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
